Dashboard.title: Welcome to Vivasayi
Dashboard.description: Your smart partner in modern farming. Powerful AI tools to boost your yield and protect your crops.
Dashboard.feature1Description: Get tailored crop suggestions based on your farm's data.
Dashboard.feature2Description: Quickly identify plant diseases with our offline-first tool.
Dashboard.feature3Description: Receive daily advice optimized for your crops and weather.

CropRecommendationPage.title: AI Crop Recommendation
CropRecommendationPage.description: Fill in the details below to receive AI-powered crop recommendations tailored to your farm.

DiseaseDetectionPage.title: Plant Disease Detection
DiseaseDetectionPage.description: Upload an image of a plant leaf to detect diseases using AI. This feature works even when you are offline.

PersonalizedSpacePage.title: Personalized Cultivation Space
PersonalizedSpacePage.description: Generate a complete, week-by-week cultivation plan for your farm, from sowing to harvest.

CropPricesCard.title: Live Mandi Prices
CropPricesCard.description: Latest commodity prices from markets across India.

CropRecommendationForm.soilAnalysisPlaceholder: e.g., pH: 6.5, Nitrogen: High, Phosphorus: Medium, Potassium: Low
CropRecommendationForm.soilAnalysisDescription: Enter the results from your latest soil test.
CropRecommendationForm.weatherDataPlaceholder: e.g., Avg. Temp: 25°C, Annual Rainfall: 1200mm, Sunny days: ~280
CropRecommendationForm.placeholder: Your personalized crop recommendations will appear here.
CropRecommendationForm.cropHistoryDescription: Select the crops grown in this field previously.
CropRecommendationForm.planFailed: Failed to get recommendations. Please try again.

DiseaseDetectionCard.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This tool is for informational purposes only. Always consult with a local agricultural expert for definitive diagnosis.
DiseaseDetectionCard.invalidFileDescription: Please upload a valid image file.
DiseaseDetectionCard.analysisFailedDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

PersonalizedSpace.formDescription: Provide your farm's details to generate a plan.
PersonalizedSpace.sowingDateDescription: This helps track your weekly progress.
PersonalizedSpace.soilReportDescription: Uploading a report provides more accurate advice.
PersonalizedSpace.planDescription: A weekly guide from sowing to harvest.
PersonalizedSpace.placeholder: Your personalized cultivation plan will appear here once generated.
PersonalizedSpace.disclaimer: This is an AI-generated plan. Always adapt based on real-world field conditions and consult local experts.

error.title: Error
error.planFailed: Failed to generate cultivation plan. Please try again.
error.pdfFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again later.
error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.modelOverloaded: AI is currently overloaded. Please try again.

PersonalizedSpace.saveFailedDescription: Failed to save cultivation plan. Please try again.

LoginPage.title: Welcome to Vivasayi
LoginPage.description: Access your account to get started.

LoginForm.errorDescription: Please check your credentials and try again.

RegisterForm.checkEmailDescription: We've sent you a confirmation link.
RegisterForm.errorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again.
RegisterForm.reportUploadSkippedDescription: Please verify your email first. You can upload the report from your profile later.

ProfilePage.title: My Profile
ProfilePage.soilHealthDescription: Keep your soil profile updated for accurate recommendations.
ProfilePage.appSettingsDescription: Change your preferred language for the application.
ProfilePage.reportUploadedDescription: Your soil report has been successfully uploaded.
ProfilePage.uploadFailedDescription: Failed to upload the soil report.

FarmsAddPage.authRequiredDescription: You must be logged in to add a farm.
FarmsAddPage.errorDescription: Failed to add farm. Please try again.
FarmsAddPage.title: Add Farm
FarmsAddPage.description: Enter the details of your new farm.

FarmsPage.title: My Farms
FarmsPage.addFirstFarm: Add your first farm to get started.

VoiceInputButton.unsupportedDescription: Voice input is not supported on your browser.
VoiceInputButton.languageNotSupportedDescription: Voice input isn't available in {langName} on this device. Try typing instead, or switch to a language your device supports for voice.

SpeakButton.unsupportedDescription: Your browser does not support text-to-speech.
SpeakButton.voiceNotAvailableTitle: Voice not available on this device
SpeakButton.voiceNotAvailableDescription: Your device doesn't have a text-to-speech voice installed for {langName}. The text is still shown above — some devices let you install more voices in their system language settings.
SpeakButton.errorDescription: Something went wrong with text-to-speech. Please try again.

DailyAssistant.title: Your Cultivation Plan
DailyAssistant.description: A weekly guide from sowing to harvest.
